response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and software engineer, but lacks the specialized hardware and AI infrastructure background required for this role. The position demands deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and deep learning workload optimization for hardware accelerators, whereas his experience centers on web applications, GIS platforms, and high-level AI agent tooling.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated ability to write low-latency, high-performance applications using Dlang, C, and C++.
Strong leadership and mentoring skills, evidenced by Staff Engineer roles and open-source contributions.
concerns: Complete lack of experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No background in deep neural network training, inference optimization, or AI accelerators.
Missing preferred qualifications such as SIMD/MIMD architecture and GPU workload analysis.
